reviews.review_description: This is a great virtual tour of Athens. It works flawlessly on the Oculus go. This is well modeled and gives the impression that you are there. The giant statue of Athena is particularly impressive. I recommend it for any fan of History. I hope the developer will make more like this.
This Athens app does not work

developer_response.body: Hi - we have had many hundreds of working / active downloads of this app with no issues whatsoever, so your comment is unusual. Our analytics also shows no errors on any platform. Accordingly, we would be grateful if you could you please contact us at info@lithodomosvr.com to provide details on what doesn't work, what hardware you have, so we can investigate thoroughly. Many thanks and happy new year.

reviews.review_description: Clunky, repetitive and not enough bang for even a single buck.
